metadata.description: Personal marketplace bundling Neal Meyer's full skills set (ngmeyer-skills) as a self-contained plugin, kept in sync with upstream by a GitHub Action.

plugins.name: ngmeyer-skills
plugins.description: Ten composable thinking/engineering skills incl. council-review (DMAD), adversarial-review, rigorous-review, claude-md, session-recover, session-close, skillforge, six-pager, weekly-setup-improvements, write-well. Vendored from ngmeyer/skills@main; auto-synced.
